channel.title: AI Pulse Checker — AI Tool Reviews
channel.description: Honest, in-depth AI tool reviews across writing, coding, design, video, marketing, and more. Hands-on testing with real scores — no paid placements.

item.title: 6sense Review — 7.5/10 | AI Pulse Checker
item.description: 6sense scores 7.5/10 in our hands-on testing. AI-powered B2B intent data and predictive analytics. Priced at Custom. Read our full breakdown of features, pri...
item.dc:creator: AI Pulse Checker

item.description: Our Ada review: 8.0/10 after 40+ hours of testing. Enterprise AI customer service automation. Priced at Custom. Honest verdict with no sponsored influence.
